title.zh: 离散采样系统混叠演示

subtitle.en: Interactive stability visualization for a zero-order-hold sampled-data system
subtitle.zh: 零阶保持采样数据系统的稳定性交互演示

intro.en: Explore how the sampling interval changes the closed-loop spectral radius, sampled sequence, and intersample waveform behavior.
intro.zh: 观察采样间隔如何改变闭环谱半径、采样序列以及采样间连续波形表现。
